bg-swap.prompt_template: replace background only with <target-bg>, preserve subject identity, preserve face, preserve clothing, preserve pose exactly, natural lighting on subject

stylize.prompt_template: <style-description>, preserve facial features and proportions, preserve identity

style_presets.watercolor: watercolor painting style, soft pastels, visible brush texture
style_presets.oil: oil painting style, thick impasto strokes, rich pigments
style_presets.acrylic: acrylic painting style, clean color blocks, matte finish
style_presets.comic: comic illustration style, bold ink outlines, flat cell shading

restore.prompt_template: restore colors and clarity of this photograph, reduce grain and noise, recover faded tones, preserve original faces and composition exactly

group-tone.prompt_template: match the white balance and tonal profile of the reference image, preserve every subject's identity and clothing, do not re-pose or re-crop

face_preservation.implementation_note: Current image-to-image endpoint has no pixel-accurate identity lock. Strength is expressed via prompt wording only — cannot guarantee identical faces.

negative_prompt_common: different face, different person, distorted eyes, extra fingers, plastic skin, airbrushed, deformed hands, altered clothing
